title: Wither Steel
description: Adds a new material, Made by combining wither dust(gotten from wither skeleton heads) and netherite scrap, this new material works as a alternate(and better!) version of netherite, giving you fire resistance, and making your sword deal withering damage!
body:
This mod adds Withersteel, a new material, you get it from making Wither Dust, which is made from Wither Skeleton Skulls, combined with netherite scrap, they make Withersteel, this can be used to create
- Wither Steel Armor:
   - Gives the user fire resistance
   - Gives the user strength while on fire
- Wither Steel Flamberge:
   - Has a small chance to apply the wither effect on hit
   - Deals 9 attack damage, but has a slower attack speed

This mod also adds the Retribution enchantment, which works only with the Flamberge, which stores the damage the user recieves and lets it be released in an attack
